item.title: Does DOJ even know how to issue subpoenas for a proper purpose these days?
item.description:
Judge Patrick Schiltz quashed federal grand jury subpoenas issued against Minnesota officials. The move echoes the quashed Federal Reserve and trans care subpoenas.

item.title: Judge Orders Release of Palestinian Community Leader Wrongfully Detained by ICE
